creator: phanquochien@gmail.com
text:
While I'm testing FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT on EC2 ! When I try disable checksum offloading on interface 'xn0' and enable it immediately by below command it caused network hang:

ifconfig xn0 -txcsum
ifconfig xn0 txcsum

Only network problem, everything is running (I used cronjob to test it)

How-To-Repeat: Disable checksum offloading on interface 'xn0' and enable it immediately
